name: Signature Scanner
description: Sidebar widget for IDA-style byte pattern signature scanning and generation.
longdescription:
A Binary Ninja sidebar plugin for scanning and generating byte pattern signatures.

Features:
- IDA-style byte pattern scanning with wildcard support (? and ??)
- Sidebar UI with results table (Address, RVA, Section, Function, Instruction)
- Signature generator with [marked] byte support for important offsets
- Scan history (last 10 signatures)
- All segments or executable-only scanning
- Right-click context menu integration
- Auto-strips non-hex junk from pasted signatures
